blocked.title: Usage lower than expected
blocked.reason: The mapped deposit line item exists in the detail payload but did not render as a selectable row in the current browser session.
blocked.notes: The scenario manifest line ID is still present in the deposit detail API response. | Marked blocked instead of failed because this indicates UI availability drift rather than a verified reconciliation logic defect.
